description_long: This is a light gray, dome-shaped hat with a smooth, continuous surface and a gently flared brim. The front of the hat features a prominent yellow star-shaped patch with cartoonish eyes marked as 'X' and a small white mustache, giving it a playful and distinctive appearance. The brim is moderately wide and curves downward, providing some shade and coverage. The crown is low and rounded, blending seamlessly into the brim without any visible seams or panels. The hat appears to be made from a soft, fabric-like material, likely felt or cotton, with a matte finish. There are no visible ventilation holes, straps, or additional embellishments apart from the decorative patch.
description: A light gray, dome-shaped hat with a downward-curved brim and a yellow star cartoon patch on the front. The surface is smooth and matte, with a playful decorative element.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow star cartoon patch with 'X' eyes and a mustache on the dome-shaped, light gray hat.
description_view_1: Side view with the brim and dome visible, only a small edge of the star patch is seen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, uninterrupted gray surface of the hat with no visible decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a slight glimpse of the star patch at the edge.
attribute_brand_or_logo: yellow star cartoon with 'X' eyes and mustache
